forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northeasterly 20 to 25 km/h turning northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day.
No Rating
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 30 to 35 km/h tending westerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting southwesterly 20 to 25 km/h during the day.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely during the morning. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning.
Partly cloudy. Winds northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 25 to 30 km/h tending northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day.
High
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 25 to 30 km/h tending westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h later.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely during the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h tending northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h tending northerly in the morning then becoming light in the late evening.
High
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 25 km/h increasing to 35 km/h before turning west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 30 km/h before turning west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely during the morning. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h.
Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h tending northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h tending northerly 25 to 35 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening.
Moderate
Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Mostly sunny day. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending westerly during the morning then becoming light during the evening.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely later in the day. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely during the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning.
Mostly clear. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h tending northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning.
Moderate
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the late morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 20 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the evening.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely later in the day. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely during the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely later this evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h turning northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h in the early morning then decreasing to 20 to 25 km/h in the evening.
Moderate
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h tending westerly 30 to 40 km/h in the middle of the day then decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the evening.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely during the morning. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h.
